system.description: The Ghost Field sometimes remembers rooms or entire neighborhoods that no longer exist in the material world. Some defended sites hide treasures in these spaces that can only be accessed if you know how.
system.additional_info:
How are colors different in these shadow rooms? Is there a smell or sound that lingers? How does it feel to step out of the material world? What natural laws work differently here, like fire not flickering?

Dangers:
• The access point to the shadow rooms is an enchanted lock, its location is known and guarded.
• The shadow rooms are only connected to the material world a few times a year, or less.

Remedies:
• Transitioning from the material world to the shadow rooms involves certain proscribed movements; cross the courtyard three times, then back down stairs with eyes closed (for example.) Too many people know the formula.
• The current site owners do not know these rooms exist.
